title: hieracium solidagineum subsp. neosonchoides
parts: Hieracium solidagineum subsp. neosonchoides has many medicinal parts, such as its leaves, flowers, and roots. The leaves of this plant are known to contain flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic acids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The flowers of Hieracium solidagineum subsp. neosonchoides contain sesquiterpenes, such as sonchogenin, which are thought to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The roots of the plant are also a source of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids, which may have analgesic and antiseptic properties.
